productDisplayName: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star Unisex Navy Blue & Red Shoe
description: Navy blue and red canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long red canvas tongue in contrast colour for added comfort and snug fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains
